description: You stand in a dim clearing deep within the Shoelace Forest. Tangled laces hang from gnarled shoe-trees like vines, and the air smells faintly of leather polish. Somewhere nearby, something hisses.

wall.description: A thick wall of woven shoelaces blocks your path. They're knotted too tightly to untangle.

floor.description: Worn dirt floor, scuffed by countless soles.

exit_north.description: A narrow gap in the lace-wall opens northward. A faint breeze carries the scent of pancakes from beyond.

exit_south.description: A muddy trail leads south, disappearing into deeper forest.

npc_sue.description: Sue the Sandal stands here, tapping her sole impatiently. Her buckle glints in the dim light.

dialogue.text: "Oh! A tennis shoe! You're Fred, aren't you? I've heard your screaming from three blocks away."
dialogue.hint: Try using SCREAM to impress her.

dialogue.text: "Impressive pipes! Listen — I saw something slithering near the south exit. And that old fridge over there? Someone stashed something inside it. Be careful."
"You've already gotten everything out of me, Fred. Go find your pasta!"

item_fridge.description: A battered mini-fridge stands wedged between the lace-walls. Its door is slightly ajar, and a faint warmth radiates from inside.

item.name: Mini Fridge
item.opened_description: The fridge stands open and empty. A lingering spice scent hangs in the air.

enemy_snake.description: A coiled Shoelace Snake blocks the path, its frayed tongue flicking menacingly. It hisses a warning as you approach.

enemy.name: Shoelace Snake
enemy.defeat_message: The Shoelace Snake unravels into a harmless pile of laces!
